# beehive_hidato Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-04

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x, HTML5, CSS3 + React 18, React Router, Vite, Vitest + Testing Library, Playwright (a11y/responsive smoke), `react-confetti` (or equivalent), optional `zod` for form validation (001-beehive-hidato-site)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x, HTML5, CSS3: Follow standard conventions
